10

Pass-Fail Grading Option

To register for a course under the pass- fail option, an undergraduate must have completed 30 or more credit hours with a GPA of at least 2.0. At least 15 of these credit hours must have been completed at University of Maryland, College Park with a University of Maryland GPA of at least 2.0.

•

Courses for which this option applies must be electives in the student’s program; they may not be college, major, field of concentration, or general education program requirements.

•

implications for transcripts and cumulative GPA.

for the pass-fail grading option. For more information, please see “Academic Records and Regulations” in the “Academic Policies and Procedures” section of the Undergraduate Catalog at academiccatalog.umd.edu.

• Only one course per semester may be registered under the pass-fail option.

For more information, please see “Academic Records and Regulations” in the “Academic Policies and Procedures” section of the Undergraduate Catalog at academiccatalog. umd.edu/undergraduate/registration- academic-requirements-regulations/ academic-records-regulations.

• No more than 12 semester hours of credit may be taken under the pass-fail option during a student’s college career.
